response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development and leadership roles, but his technical background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, etc.) rather than the mandatory C++ development on Windows required for this role. While he has some C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it is minimal compared to the 5–10 years specified. Additionally, his domain expertise does not align with capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, and he lacks experience with SQL Server/Oracle or messaging frameworks like Kafka/MQ. His strengths lie in full-stack development and open-source contributions, but these do not compensate for the critical gaps in the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js
Proven leadership in software engineering teams and open-source project contributions
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory)
concerns: Minimal C++ development experience (only ~1 year at National Instruments, not Windows-focused)
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Lacks experience with SQL Server/Oracle and messaging frameworks required for the role

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
